message:
fix(runtime): improve resize coalescer integration and clean up legacy code

Continues the resize debouncer → coalescer migration:

- Move dimension clamping (min 1) before the match on resize behavior
  so both Immediate and Throttled paths benefit from zero-size protection

- Replace the simple record_external_apply() stub with a full
  implementation that properly updates event tracking (rate window,
  regime detection), clears pending state, resets cooldown, and fires
  telemetry hooks, preventing stale state after immediate resizes

- Replace AppBuilder::resize_debounce(Duration) with
  resize_coalescer(CoalescerConfig) to expose the full coalescer
  config instead of just the steady-state delay

- Remove remaining ResizeDebouncer unit tests that tested the deleted
  debounce_no_action_for_same_size and time_until_apply logic, now
  covered by resize_coalescer.rs tests

- Add "apply_immediate" action string to log_decision's applied_size
  check so telemetry correctly records immediate-mode resizes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
